name: @elizaos/plugin-computeruse
description: Desktop automation plugin — screenshots, mouse/keyboard control, browser CDP, window management for elizaOS agents. Ported from open-computer-use (Apache 2.0).

COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED.description: Enable computer use capabilities (desktop automation, screenshots, browser control)

COMPUTER_USE_SCREENSHOT_AFTER_ACTION.description: Automatically capture a screenshot after each desktop action

COMPUTER_USE_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum action execution timeout in milliseconds

COMPUTER_USE_APPROVAL_MODE.description: Approval mode for local computer actions: full_control, smart_approve, approve_all, or off

COMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_HEADLESS.description: Launch browser automation in headless mode when the environment does not allow visible windows
